name: Sportster
description: Sport Trike Kit for H-D Sportster. It is very important that you choose the year of your bike. Harley-Davidson has made small design changes over the years, and Frankenstein Trikes has developed components specific to each year to ensure proper fitment.

name: Dyna
description: Sport Trike Kit for H-D Dyna. Selecting the correct motorcycle year is critical, as Harley-Davidson implemented various design modifications across production years. Frankenstein Trikes has engineered components tailored to each specific year to ensure proper fitment.

name: Softail
description: Sport Trike Kit for H-D Softail. It is very important that you choose the year of your bike. Harley-Davidson has made small design changes over the years. We have made components specific to each year. Prospective buyers should select their motorcycle's year before proceeding.

name: Rocker & Breakout
description: Sport Trike Kit for H-D Rocker & Breakout. It is very important that you choose the year of your bike, because Harley-Davidson implements incremental design modifications annually. Frankenstein Trikes manufactures components tailored to each specific model year.

name: Fat Boy & Heritage
description: Sport Trike Kit for H-D Heritage, Fatboy & Deluxe. Selecting the correct motorcycle year is crucial, as Harley-Davidson has made small design changes over the years and Frankenstein Trikes has tailored components accordingly to ensure proper fitment for each specific year.

name: FLT FLH & Roadking
description: Sport Trike Kit for FLT, FLH & Roadking. Selecting the correct motorcycle year is essential because Harley-Davidson has made small design changes over the years. Frankenstein Trikes has made components specific to each year to ensure proper fitment.

name: V-Rod
description: Sport Trike Kit for V-Rod. It is very important that you choose the year of your bike. Harley-Davidson has made small design changes over the years. We have made components specific to each year. The kit is offered in two tire configuration options: 180-200 tire variant and 240 tire variant.

name: FXR
description: Frankenstein Sport Trike Kit for Harley-Davidson FXR. A precision-engineered conversion kit that has earned customer praise for its well-designed rear end. Built to Frankenstein Trikes' standards with year-specific components for reliable fitment on FXR platform motorcycles.

name: 4 Speed FL/FX
description: Frankenstein Sport Trike Kit for Harley-Davidson 4 Speed FL/FX. Designed specifically for the classic 1971-1985 4-speed Harley-Davidson FL and FX models. Includes a one-year warranty and is engineered to fit the vintage 4-speed platform.
imageUrl: https://frankensteintrikes.com/images/package trike kit pages/4 speed/package trike kit page 4 speed.jpg

name: Street
description: Frankenstein Sport Trike Kit for Harley-Davidson Street. Engineered to convert the Harley-Davidson Street motorcycle platform into a trike. Mechanics have praised the rear end design and construction quality of Frankenstein's kits.
imageUrl: https://frankensteintrikes.com/images/package trike kit pages/Street/package trike kit page street.jpg

name: Yamaha
description: Sport Trike Kit for Yamaha. Frankenstein Trikes offers trike conversion kits for a variety of Yamaha motorcycle models. Please click on your model to continue: Yamaha Road Star 1600/1700, Yamaha Road Star Raider 1900, Yamaha Bolt 950, Yamaha V-Star 950, and Yamaha V-Star 1300.
imageUrl: https://frankensteintrikes.com/images/package trike kit pages/Yamaha/Yamaha website/Yamaha Road Star body clipped.jpg

name: Kawasaki 1700
description: Frankenstein Sport Trike Kit for Kawasaki 1700. Engineered with a precision rear end design that mechanics have praised as thoroughly worked out. Built for the Kawasaki 1700 platform with Frankenstein Trikes' signature construction quality.
imageUrl: https://frankensteintrikes.com/images/package trike kit pages/Kawasaki 1700/package trike kit page kawasaki 1700.jpg

name: Frankenstein Old School (DNA)
description: Frankenstein Trikes Old School Kit for Harley-Davidson. This kit uses a DNA rear end for a classic old school trike look. A heritage-styled trike conversion designed for traditionalists who want vintage aesthetics paired with Frankenstein Trikes' engineering.
